OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Yan Laikuen Wong is present.
Attorney Daniel Cheung for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tibor Szabo is present, in pro per.

The litigants and counsel hold settlement discussions with JPT Aaron Gruber. The matter did not settle. Trial remains set for Dec-23-2024.
